seoTitle: How to Connect Wix Email to Gmail (Full Setup)
metaDescription: Learn how to send and receive your Wix custom domain email inside Gmail by configuring POP3 and SMTP server settings.
intro: If you have a professional email address through your Wix domain, you can route it into Gmail so all your correspondence lives in one inbox. This guide walks through gathering your Wix mail server credentials and configuring Gmail's incoming and outgoing settings so you can send and receive from your custom domain directly.

steps.heading: Find your Wix email server details
steps.body: Open your Wix dashboard and locate your custom domain email connection parameters, including incoming and outgoing server credentials.

steps.heading: Copy your POP3 and SMTP details
steps.body: Note down your incoming POP3 and outgoing SMTP server addresses, port numbers, and security settings.

steps.heading: Open Gmail's Accounts and Import settings
steps.body: In Gmail, navigate to the Accounts and Import tab under settings.

steps.heading: Add your Wix email as a mail account
steps.body: Use the Check mail from other accounts option to add your Wix email address using the POP3 details you gathered.

steps.heading: Configure Send mail as
steps.body: Set up the Send mail as option so Gmail can compose and send messages that appear to come from your custom domain.

steps.heading: Test send and receive
steps.body: Send a test message to and from the connected account to confirm the sync works both ways.

faq.question: Can I both send and receive from my Wix email inside Gmail?
faq.answer: Yes, setting up both the incoming POP3 connection and the outgoing Send mail as option lets you fully manage the Wix email from Gmail.

faq.question: Do I need special credentials from Wix to do this?
faq.answer: Yes, you need your Wix mailbox's specific incoming and outgoing server details, including port numbers and security keys.

faq.question: Will emails still be accessible from Wix directly?
faq.answer: Depending on your POP3 settings, mail may or may not remain on the Wix server after being pulled into Gmail, so check your download settings.

faq.question: Can I use labels to separate my Wix emails from personal mail?
faq.answer: Yes, Gmail filters and labels can be used to keep your business domain messages separated from your personal inbox.
